name: Divine-Querying Master Smith
description: Increases Max HP by 12%. Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG dealt to enemy targets in the DEF reduction state by 28%. After the wearer inflicts the DEF reduction state on an enemy target, all allies gain "Comburent" for 2 turns. This effect cannot be stacked. The DMG dealt by ally targets with "Comburent" increases by 15%. This effect can be triggered again after the wearer uses an attack.
